overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character sailing a wooden boat on the Nile River toward the ancient Egyptian city of Memphis, disembarking at a stone dock, and walking through a sunlit ceremonial avenue lined with palm trees and hieroglyphics toward a grand temple entrance.

events.description: boat slows down as it approaches the stone dock

agents.ego_description: standing at the rear of a wooden sailboat navigating the river toward the city dock

notable_agents.action: child standing at the bow of the boat looking toward the approaching shore

entered.detail: small wooden vessel with weathered sail carrying the player character
murky brown water of the Nile river with gentle ripples
large desert cliff formation with ancient structures and palm trees atop
stone landing platform extending from the shore into the water
tall dark stone obelisk monument near the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view from a wooden sailboat navigating the Nile River toward the ancient city of Memphis. The boat carries the player character and a child NPC, approaching a stone dock with a tall black obelisk visible on the shore. The river water is murky brown, and rocky cliffs rise in the background under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and obelisk

events.description: character disembarks from boat onto stone dock and begins walking
transition from boat navigation to walking on foot

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone waterfront path away from the dock, passing the tall obelisk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white robes walking down the path toward the waterfront

entered.detail: wide stone pavement with carved hieroglyphic patterns
tall palm trees lining the edge of the path
large stone bowl on a pedestal for burning offerings

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the boat onto a stone dock and begins walking along the waterfront promenade. The path is paved with stone tiles and lined with palm trees. The character passes a tall black obelisk on the left and encounters a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. The rocky cliffs of the desert plateau remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial avenue with hieroglyphic pavement leading to temple

events.description: enters the main ceremonial path covered in hieroglyphics
dust and heat haze become more visible around the temple entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking up the central ceremonial path covered in hieroglyphics toward the temple complex

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking parallel to the path on the left side

entered.detail: stone pavement completely covered in carved Egyptian hieroglyphics and symbols
massive stone temple entrance with large columns and statues
matching stone braziers flanking both sides of the avenue

changed.to: center_far but closer and more detailed

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a wide ceremonial avenue paved with stones covered in hieroglyphics. The path leads directly toward an impressive ancient temple facade in the distance. Palm trees line both sides of the avenue, and pairs of stone ceremonial braziers flank the path. The heat creates a shimmering haze around the temple entrance as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with decorated columns and stairs

events.description: approaches the temple entrance and begins ascending the stairs
enters the shaded area under the temple canopy, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs into the temple entrance, passing between massive decorated columns

notable_agents.action: temple priest or guard in white robes descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up into the temple structure
massive stone columns with colorful painted hieroglyphic carvings
temple walls covered in detailed Egyptian artwork and inscriptions

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the temple entrance and begins ascending a wide stone staircase. The entrance is flanked by massive columns covered in colorful hieroglyphic paintings. As the character climbs, they pass into the shaded area under the temple canopy where the lighting shifts to a mix of bright sunlight and cool shadows. A temple priest descends the stairs as the character enters the sacred structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the murky waters of the Nile River into the shaded sanctuary of a grand Egyptian temple. It begins aboard a wooden sailboat navigating toward the city of Memphis, gliding past rocky cliffs under a clear blue sky before the character disembarks onto a stone dock. As the camera moves inland, the scene shifts from the waterfront promenade and its towering black obelisk to a wide ceremonial avenue paved with hieroglyphics and lined with palm trees. The path then opens toward a shimmering temple facade in the distance, where the heat creates a visible haze around the entrance. Finally, the character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by colorful columns, moving from the bright sunlight into the cool shadows of the temple canopy as a priest descends to meet them.
